name: oazen
description: Local memory runtime for coding agents

scripts.test:benchmark: npm run build && node dist/eval/run-benchmark.js fixtures/benchmark/tasks.json
scripts.test:benchmark:strict: npm run build && node dist/eval/run-benchmark.js fixtures/benchmark/tasks.json --strict
scripts.test:benchmark:codex-exported: npm run build && node dist/eval/run-benchmark.js fixtures/benchmark/codex-exported.json
scripts.test:benchmark:codex-exported:strict: npm run build && node dist/eval/run-benchmark.js fixtures/benchmark/codex-exported.json --strict
